_comment_purpose: Slither static analysis config (D-33 / T-0-staticgate). High-severity CI gate — see contracts.yml Step 5.
_comment_suppressions: Suppressions require // slither-disable-next-line <detector> + written justification in the same line comment. NO blanket disables.
_comment_fail_on: HIGH = fail CI on high-severity findings. Medium/low/informational are reported in job log but non-blocking (D-33).
_comment_exclude_informational: Informational findings are noise in Phase 0 — suppress but still print in log.
